arts.ttl: Alan Shearer aims ruthless Liverpool dig at Micah Richards - 'He was gritting his teeth'
arts.sum: Liverpool moved 11 points clear at the top of the Premier League with their 2-0 win over Man City

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta issues defiant four-word title message - with Arsenal 11 points behind Premier League leaders Liverpool
arts.sum: The Gunners had the chance to close the gap to five points on Saturday afternoon and were expected to do so at home against against 16th-placed West Ham .

arts.ttl: Liverpool star's 'I'd love to stay' statement goes against what Arne Slot believes
arts.sum: Liverpool boss Arne Slot believes Virgil van Dijk is the player most likely to move into management at the end of his playing career, despite the defender's current reluctance

arts.ttl: Eight outfield players hope for Italy call-up but Chiesa ‘failed’ at Liverpool
arts.sum: According to La Gazzetta dello Sport, eight players hope to be included in the Italy...

arts.ttl: Arne Slot gives thoughts on Alexander Isak after being tipped to sign Newcastle star
arts.sum: Liverpool boss Arne Slot is under no illusions about the threat that Newcastle striker Alexander Isak will pose when the two sides meet at Anfield on Wednesday night

arts.ttl: Lewis Miley drops hint on Eddie Howe's Newcastle selection policy as he sweats on Liverpool role
arts.sum: Miley - who has overcome foot and back injuries in the last 12 months - told Chronicle Live: "I think every player's got to wait for the opportunity. Miley has revealed he discovered he'd been handed his first top flight start in almost 12 months after being told in training by Howe.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot reveals role Liverpool players can have in Mohamed Salah contract talks
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah continues to enjoy a remarkable season for Liverpool but is no closer to extending his contract at Anfield.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot makes Mo Salah contract admission as Liverpool form adds complication
arts.sum: Mo Salah reached 30 goals for the season in Sunday's 2-0 win against Manchester City but the Liverpool superstar only has four months remaining on his contract, leaving his future uncertain

arts.ttl: Man City transfer news: Citizens to use Erling Haaland to lure Arsenal, Liverpool target to Etihad?
arts.sum: Manchester City are reportedly hopeful of beating both Arsenal and Liverpool in the race to sign a £20m-rated midfield wonderkid.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot confirms extended Liverpool injury layoff as Alexis Mac Allister update given
arts.sum: Arne Slot issued the latest Liverpool team news ahead of the visit of Newcastle United to Anfield on Wednesday
